items.headline: Japan waits on star forward Mitoma's fitness for World Cup after injury in Brighton game
items.description:
BRIGHTON, England (AP) — Japan coach Hajime Moriyasu has an anxious wait on the fitness of star forward Kaoru Mitoma before naming a World Cup squad on Friday.
Mitoma limped off with an apparent hamstring injury Saturday in the second half of Brighton’s 3-0 win over Wolverhampton in the Premier League.
